description_long: This is a modern, luxury bungalow set within a walled property featuring a large, flat-roofed main building with expansive glass windows and clean geometric lines. The grounds include a tennis court, landscaped gardens with palm trees and shrubs, and multiple paved outdoor seating areas. The front of the bungalow has a driveway leading to a multi-car garage, while the rear opens to a spacious patio and pool area. The building itself is predominantly white and gray, with large window panels and a rooftop terrace. The property is surrounded by a low, light-colored perimeter wall, providing privacy and a sense of exclusivity. The overall design emphasizes open space, outdoor living, and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern, flat-roofed luxury bungalow with large glass windows, landscaped gardens, a tennis court, and multiple outdoor living spaces within a walled property.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, multi-car garage, main entrance, and landscaped front garden.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tennis court, side garden, and the rear patio with pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring the tennis court in the foreground, spacious patio, pool, and large glass windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and additional garden space with trees and shrubs.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass panels
